channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Middle East latest: US military says it bombed a Houthi military facility in Yemen's capital
item.description: The U.S. military on Tuesday said it bombed a Houthi military facility in Yemen’s capital, Sanaa, the latest U.S.-led attack on the Iranian-backed rebels. The Houthi media office said the strike hit part of the sprawling complex that houses the rebels’ Defense Ministry.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Americans' trust in nation's court system hits record low, survey finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — At a time of heightened political division, Americans' confidence in their country’s judicial system and courts dropped to a record low of 35% this year, according to a new Gallup poll.
item.dc:creator: LINDSAY WHITEHURST, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: The Latest: Teacher and a student killed in a shooting at a private Christian school in Wisconsin
item.description: MADISON, Wis. (AP) — A teenage student opened fire at the Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin on Monday, killing a teacher and another teenage student in the final week before Christmas break. The shooter also died, police said.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: California man sentenced for 'birth tourism' scheme for affluent Chinese women
item.description: A California man at the center of a birth tourism scheme that charged pregnant Chinese women top dollar was sentenced to more than three years in prison.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bud Light no longer the best-selling draft beer at bars, data suggests
item.description: The overtaking of Bud Light as America's most popular draft beer has been "years in the making," according to the founder of Draftline Technologies.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, NewsNation

item.title: Former babysitter sentenced to life plus 40 years for murder, child abuse
item.description: Makallie Elizabeth Durham of Corinth pled guilty to capital murder and four counts of felonious child abuse on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Raven Moore, NewsNation

item.title: Is that a drone or a plane? Experts help explain the differences
item.description: Drones are being spotted all over the U.S. But are those flashing lights in the sky really airplanes.
item.dc:creator: John Seewer And Mark Scolforo, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: How to contact the Rhode Island cyberattack call center after data breach
item.description: Rhode Island officials urged residents to take immediate steps to protect themselves on Saturday, warning that the hackers could release personal data.
item.dc:creator: Leah Crowley, NewsNation

item.title: Jill Jacobson, actress who appeared on 'Star Trek' and 'Falcon Crest,' dies at 70
item.description: "We are incredibly sad to say goodbye to our beautiful, soulful, hysterically funny, elegantly raunchy client, Jill Jacobson," her manager said.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, NewsNation

item.title: Former FBI informant pleads guilty to fabricating Biden claims
item.description: A former FBI informant on Monday entered a guilty plea on four federal charges related to falsifying statements that in part spurred a GOP congressional investigation into the Biden family.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WGN 9

item.title: 16-year-old killed entire family, called 911, police say
item.description: BELEN, N.M. (KRQE) – On Sunday, New Mexico State Police (NMSP) released the names of the four victims from Saturday's homicide in Belen. Police said that 16-year-old Diego Leyva called 911 early Saturday morning and told the dispatcher he had killed his family.
item.dc:creator: Scott Brown, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Ingrid Lewis-Martin, chief adviser to NYC Mayor Eric Adams, resigns and expects to be indicted
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Ingrid Lewis-Martin, a former top aide to New York Mayor Eric Adams, expects to be indicted on criminal charges related to alleged improper gifts, her lawyer said Monday.
item.dc:creator: ANTHONY IZAGUIRRE and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Columbia professor who called Oct 7 Hamas attacks 'awesome' to teach course on Zionism
item.description: A Columbia University professor who called Hamas’ Oct. 7 attacks on Israel "awesome" has been cleared to teach a new class on Zionism, drawing criticism.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Madison, Wisconsin, school shooting leaves 2 dead, 6 injured; juvenile suspect dead
item.description: Police identified the Abundant Life Christian School shooter as 15-year-old Natalie Rupnow, who goes by Samantha. A teacher and teen student were killed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Teacher and student killed, 6 injured in Wisconsin school shooting
item.description: A teacher and a student were killed in a shooting at the Abundant Life Christian School in Madison, Wisconsin, police said Monday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Devin Willems, ABC 4

item.title: McConnell urges Trump to reject isolationism
item.description: Outgoing Senate Republican Leader Mitch McConnell (R-Ky.) is calling on President-elect Trump to reject isolationists in the Republican Party who will argue for the United States to focus on China at the expense of Ukraine and other areas of the world.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, Fox 5

item.title: Trump girds for battle with Democrats, Supreme Court over birthright citizenship
item.description: President-elect Trump, Democratic lawmakers and the Supreme Court are on a collision course over restricting birthright citizenship, which Trump has identified as a top priority for his incoming administration.
item.dc:creator: Alexander Bolton, KRON4

item.title: Point guard Dennis Schroder traded by Brooklyn to Golden State
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — By adding Dennis Schroder, the Golden State Warriors believe they have found the perfect backcourt mate to complement Stephen Curry. Curry can't wait to get going in what he expects to be a “seamless transition for him.” “It can help me, it can help us,” Curry said.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Survivors seek a reckoning as FBI investigates child sex abuse in little-known Christian sect
item.description: BOISE, Idaho (AP) — Nearly every detail about the religious group Lisa Webb’s family belonged to was hidden from the outside world. Its followers met in homes rather than churches. Its leadership structure was hard to discern, its finances opaque. It didn’t even have an official name.
item.dc:creator: REBECCA BOONE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Jalen Hurts accounts for 3 TDs and Eagles beat Steelers 27-13 for franchise-best 10th straight win
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Jalen Hurts absorbed the shots when the Eagles' recent anemic passing attack was panned by his own star wide receivers. Hurts and A.J.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: US agencies should use advanced technology to identify mysterious drones, Schumer says
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — After weeks of fear and bewilderment about the drones buzzing over parts of New York and New Jersey, elected officials are urging action to identify and stop the mysterious flights. “There’s a lot of us who are pretty frustrated right now,” Rep. Jim Himes, D-Conn.
item.dc:creator: BIANCA VÁZQUEZ TONESS and DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Private Sin: How a church protected child molesters
item.description: Protestant Reformed Churches in America is struggling with what it has called the "private sin" of child sexual abuse and decades of covering up for abusers, including church leaders and school teachers.
item.dc:creator: Ken Kolker, ABC 4

item.title: Romney: ‘You can’t complain’ if Trump does what he says he would do
item.description: “Donald Trump won. He won overwhelmingly. He said what he was going to do, and that’s what he’s doing,” Romney said Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, ABC 4

item.title: ABC settles Trump’s defamation suit for $15M
item.description: The settlement enables both the anchor and Trump to avoid sitting for court-ordered depositions next week.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, ABC 4

item.title: California man dies after being mauled by his own dogs: police
item.description: A man was mauled by his three dogs at a neighborhood park Thursday afternoon, according to the San Diego Police Department.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, KTLA 5

item.title: The original lyrics of 'Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas' were extremely depressing
item.description: “Have Yourself a Merry Little Christmas” is already more melancholy than most classic Christmas songs, but its earlier version was a downright downer.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Former Manhattan prosecutor to represent suspect in killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The suspect in the killing of UnitedHealthcare’s CEO has added a prominent defense lawyer to his legal team as Manhattan prosecutors work to return him from Pennsylvania to face a murder charge.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Jamie Foxx reportedly injured in altercation at Beverly Hills restaurant
item.description: Foxx, who turned 57 on Friday, was dining with family at Mr. Chow when patrons at a nearby table hurled rude and vulgar insults to the "In Living Color" and "Ray" star, a witness told TMZ.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Conan O'Brien's parents die within days of each other
item.description: Dr. Thomas O’Brien and Ruth R. O’Brien, the parents of late-night icon Conan O’Brien, both passed away within days of each other at their home in Brookline, Massachusetts.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Amazon to donate $1 million to Trump inauguration, matching Meta
item.description: E-commerce giant Amazon is planning to donate $1 million to President-elect Donald Trump’s inaugural fund, matching the amount Meta already donated to the incoming president’s inauguration.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Nearly half of US teens are online 'constantly': Pew report
item.description: Nearly half of American teenagers say they are online “constantly” despite concerns about the effects of social media and smartphones on their mental health, according to a new report published Thursday by the Pew Research Center.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC
